name: Imperial Lake View Resort & Golf Club
notes: 36-hole facility consisting of four 9-hole courses: Mountain (A), Lake (B), Desert (C), and Links/Scottish (D). Originally designed by Roger Packard (1993); Ronald Fream also credited with a 2006 redesign/expansion on some sources. Located on the Cha Am - Hua Hin bypass road, approximately 35 minutes north of Hua Hin town centre; 16 km from central Hua Hin. Also known as 'Imperial Lake View Golf Club' — affiliated with Imperial Hotels group (booking@imperialhotels.com). Address: 80 Moo 4, Hubkrapong-Pranburi Highway, Cha-Am, Phetchaburi 76120. Hosted 2025 Asian Tour Q-school. Green fee rates vary by source: huahingolfcourse.com lists THB 1,200 flat; golfsavers.com lists THB 1,000 weekday / THB 1,350 weekend; huahingolfcourses.com lists all-inclusive rate of THB 1,950. The weekday/weekend split from golfsavers.com used here as most granular. Cart is 750 THB per 2 persons (shared). Facebook: facebook.com/lakeviewgolfandyachtclub. GPS from golfhuahin.com: 12.70601, 99.88898.
